title: Euphorics
description: See what abstractions lie beyond our mortal coil...
body:
Euphorics


To End or to Dust... THAT Is the QUESTION! Originally designed for ContentSMP!

Euphorics adds a brand new material called **ENDUST** that you can use to enter the **ASTRAL PLANE**... THOUGH BE CAREFUL! There are risks if you use too much... HOW TO MAKE ENDUST: - First, harvest **RAW ENDUST** from the End Portal frames by Right-Clicking with any Pickaxe (Iron level or Above) - Next, place the raw endust down and let the strange gravity take it upwards into a Spore Blossom above, infusing it with the raw endust - Then, place a cauldron directly beneath the raw endust infused spore blossom, make sure to light either soul fire or a soul campfire underneath the cauldron... After the spore blossom withers away, the endust should be cooked and you'll have **SOUL FIRED ENDUST** - Now, take your soul fired endust and place it on the ground, make sure you have a sculk catalyst in order to kill mobs and spread sculk onto the soul fired endust... That'll turn it into **UNCRYSTALLIZED ENDUST** - Alright, take your uncrystallized endust and place it directly next to any budding amethyst blocks, then wait... It'll eventually turn into a **CRYSTALLIZED ENDUST BLOCK** - Finally, you can either break it directly with a pickaxe to get 1-2 **CYSRTALLIZED ENDUST** item OR use a Silk Touch pick to take it and place it elsewhere where you can then lure a Goat into ramming the block instead to yield 4-9 crystallized endust items - After that, Enjoy at your own Risk! RAW ENDUST: - It can ONLY be stored within an upside-down storage container - Only gives a visual effect that lasts for 10 seconds CRYSTALLIZED ENDUST/ASTRAL PLANE: - Effects last for 40 seconds (using more will stack the duration of the effect) - Use SNEAK + SWAP HANDS to Phase Shift in or out of the **ASTRAL PLANE** - WHILE in the Astral Plane, you are completely immune to any damage and are unable to interact with most things - Players who AREN'T in the Astral Plane WON'T be able to see those who ARE in it - _It's Risky to stay in the Astral Plane for too long..._
Spoiler SHADES: - Strange creatures from beyond the veil that'll protect the astral plane no matter what, wanting to ensure your death if you intrude upon their home for too long... - Only visible to players actively using endust - Their aggression can be tracked from a meter only visible within your inventory, avoid the astral plane and the shades to prevent further aggression
